_cowork_note: Cowork does not support PostToolUse hooks. Automatic sequences are embedded in each command's workflow steps. The weekly calibration review is a Scheduled Task — set it up via Claude Desktop → left sidebar → Scheduled → New Task.

scheduled_tasks.name: weekly-calibration-review
scheduled_tasks.description: Every Monday 9am — surfaces unresolved predictions from the decision ledger
scheduled_tasks._setup: Claude Desktop → left sidebar → Scheduled → New Task → command: /sentinel-review → every Monday at 09:00

_inline_sequences.note: PostToolUse hooks replaced by explicit steps in command workflows
_inline_sequences.structure-builder → reality-checker: Handled as Step 3 in STANDARD/FULL protocol in sentinel.md
_inline_sequences.prediction recording: Handled as final Write step in LITE/STANDARD/FULL protocols in sentinel.md
